name: Unicafe Inc.
summary: Unicafe Inc. engages in the production and sale of regular coffee and processed coffee products in Japan. It provides commercial coffee to various channels, such as restaurants, cafe shops, office coffee, and coffee vending machines; and industrial coffee that is used as a basic ingredient for coffee related products to beverage manufacturers and flavor companies. The company also offers Keurig, a capsule coffee system that offers professional drip coffee and tea through one machine. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
